# Customer App (Expo / React Native)

I now have enough verified detail to ground the load-bearing decisions (Chargily v2 checkout shape + dzd-only, Expo RTL restart caveat, Mapbox/MapLibre vs react-native-maps tradeoffs). Writing the section now.

## Customer Mobile App — Expo / React Native (TypeScript)

> Scope: the guest-facing app + host-mode entry. Photography-forward, fast, trustworthy. Targets Expo SDK 53 (RN New Architecture on), `expo-router` v4 (file-based, typed routes). Talks to Supabase directly via `supabase-js` v2 + RLS; no custom API server except Edge Functions for payments/payouts.

### 1. Navigation architecture

File-based routing with **`expo-router`** (typed routes enabled, `experiments.typedRoutes`). Native stacks via `expo-router`'s wrapper over `react-native-screens`; tab bar via `expo-router` Tabs (custom bar component for RTL + 3-icon prominence). Top-level layout is an **auth/role gate** that swaps route groups.

Route group tree (`app/`):

```
app/
  _layout.tsx                      # RootLayout: providers + auth gate + i18n/RTL boot
  (public)/                        # readable without auth (see §10)
    _layout.tsx                    # PublicStack
    index.tsx                      # = redirect into (tabs)
  (auth)/                          # AuthStack, modal-presented
    _layout.tsx
    language.tsx                   # LanguagePickScreen
    intro.tsx                      # IntroCarouselScreen (skippable)
    sign-in.tsx                    # SignInScreen
    sign-up.tsx                    # SignUpScreen
    otp.tsx                        # PhoneOtpScreen  (params: phone)
  (tabs)/                          # MainTabs (guest mode)
    _layout.tsx                    # Tab navigator
    home/                          # HomeStack
      index.tsx                    # HomeScreen (rails)
      collection/[slug].tsx        # CollectionScreen (featured)
    explore/                       # SearchStack
      index.tsx                    # SearchEntryScreen
      results.tsx                  # ResultsScreen (List<->Map)
      filters.tsx                  # FiltersSheet (modal)
    trips/                         # TripsStack
      index.tsx                    # TripsScreen (segmented)
      [bookingId].tsx              # TripDetailScreen
    wishlists/                     # WishlistStack
      index.tsx                    # WishlistsScreen
      [wishlistId].tsx             # WishlistDetailScreen
    inbox/                         # InboxStack
      index.tsx                    # ConversationsScreen
      [conversationId].tsx         # ChatScreen
  property/                        # shared modal/push stack, reachable from any tab
    [propertyId]/
      index.tsx                    # PropertyDetailScreen
      gallery.tsx                  # GalleryScreen (fullscreen)
      reviews.tsx                  # ReviewsScreen
      map.tsx                      # PropertyLocationScreen
  booking/                         # BookingStack (auth-gated, modal)
    [propertyId]/
      configure.tsx                # DatesGuestsScreen
      guest-details.tsx            # GuestDetailsScreen
      payment.tsx                  # PaymentMethodScreen
      processing.tsx               # PaymentProcessingScreen (webview/poll)
      confirmation.tsx             # BookingConfirmationScreen
  review/[bookingId].tsx           # WriteReviewScreen (post-checkout, modal)
  notifications/index.tsx          # NotificationsScreen
  profile/                         # ProfileStack
    index.tsx                      # ProfileScreen
    settings.tsx                   # SettingsScreen
    edit.tsx                       # EditProfileScreen
    language.tsx                   # reuse LanguagePickScreen
  (host)/                          # HOST MODE root group (lazy)
    _layout.tsx                    # HostTabs — separate navigator tree
    today/index.tsx                # HostTodayScreen
    listings/index.tsx             # HostListingsScreen
    ...                            # (owned by the host-mode subsystem doc)
```

**Tabs (guest):** `Home` (house icon), `Explore` (search icon), `Trips` (suitcase), `Wishlists` (heart), `Inbox` (chat bubble + unread badge). Profile is **not** a tab — it's an avatar button in each stack header (Airbnb-style) to keep 5 tabs uncluttered.

**"Switch to Hosting" toggle.** Lives in `ProfileScreen` as a primary row, and in a header overflow on `HostTodayScreen` to switch back. Mechanism: a `appMode: 'guest' | 'host'` value in a Zustand store (`useAppModeStore`, persisted to `expo-secure-store`). Toggling navigates `router.replace('/(host)/today')` / `router.replace('/(tabs)/home')` — a hard root swap, not a nested push, so the two navigator trees never interleave and back-gesture stays sane. Visible only if the user has a `host_profiles` row OR taps "Become a host" (routes into the host-onboarding flow owned by the host doc). Mode choice survives cold start.

**Deep links / universal links.** Scheme `{{platform_scheme}}://` + `https://{{platform_domain}}`. Configured in `app.json` (`scheme`, `ios.associatedDomains`, `android.intentFilters`) and surfaced through `expo-router`'s automatic linking. Concrete maps:
- `…/property/{id}` → `PropertyDetailScreen`
- `…/c/{slug}` → `CollectionScreen`
- `…/explore?wilaya=16&type=hotel&checkin=…` → `ResultsScreen` with pre-applied filters
- `…/booking/{ref}` → `TripDetailScreen` (resolves `bookings.reference` → id)
- `…/pay/return?checkout={chargily_id}` → `PaymentProcessingScreen` (Chargily `success_url`/`failure_url` land here)
- Push-notification taps resolve to the same paths via the `data.url` payload.

### 2. Screen inventory by area

**Onboarding / Auth** (modal group, dismissible into public browsing)
- `SplashScreen` — native splash (`expo-splash-screen`), held until i18n + session hydrate.
- `LanguagePickScreen` — AR / FR / EN cards; sets language **before** anything else (drives initial RTL).
- `IntroCarouselScreen` — 3 skippable photo slides; "Skip"/"Get started"; `hasSeenIntro` in SecureStore.
- `SignUpScreen` / `SignInScreen` — email+password and **phone** paths; Apple/Google optional (Supabase OAuth). Algeria phone input defaults to **+213**, validates mobile prefixes (05/06/07).
- `PhoneOtpScreen` — 6-digit OTP via Supabase phone auth (SMS provider, e.g. Twilio/Vonage configured server-side); autofill via `autoComplete="sms-otp"`; resend cooldown.

**Home / Discovery** — `HomeScreen`
- Greeting + location chip (current wilaya via `expo-location`, with permission-soft fallback to a wilaya picker).
- Horizontal **rails** (each a `FlashList` row, lazy/paged): `near_you`, `popular_in_wilaya` ("الأكثر طلبًا في وهران"), `beachfront`, `sahara_escapes`, `top_rated`, `recently_viewed` (local), plus server-driven `featured_collections`.
- Rails are config-driven from a `home_rails` payload (Edge Function or a `discovery_rails` view) so merchandising changes need no app release.
- `CollectionScreen` — editorial header image + curated list.

**Search & Results**
- `SearchEntryScreen` — destination autocomplete (wilaya → commune), date range (`react-native-calendars`, RTL-aware), guest stepper, property-type quick chips.
- `ResultsScreen` — **List⇄Map** segmented toggle. List = `FlashList` of result cards (blur-up cover, price/night DZD, rating, instant-book bolt). Map = price-pin map with **clustering**; pins show `1 200 دج` (Western Arabic numerals, space thousands). Panning reveals a floating **"ابحث في هذه المنطقة / Search this area"** button that re-queries the current viewport bbox. Bottom carousel of cards synced to the visible pins.
- `FiltersSheet` — price slider (DZD), property type, room/bed count, amenities grid, instant-book, free cancellation, guest rating, host language. `SortSheet` — recommended / price ↑↓ / rating / distance / newest. Applied-filter count badge on the Filters button.

**Property detail** — `PropertyDetailScreen` (sticky booking widget)
- Swipe **gallery** with blur-up (`expo-image` + BlurHash `placeholder`); tap → `GalleryScreen` (pinch-zoom, paged).
- Title, type, wilaya/commune, rating + review count; **host card** (avatar, superhost-style badge, response rate, verified ID badge, host languages) → host public profile.
- **Amenities grid** (iconified, "show all" sheet), **house rules**, **check-in/out** window, **cancellation policy** (named tier + plain-language summary), location map preview (`PropertyLocationScreen`, approximate radius until booked).
- **Availability calendar** (booked/blocked/min-stay shading).
- For `host_hotel`: **room-type selector** — list of `room_types` with photo, occupancy, price, "X left", select-to-book.
- **Reviews** with category breakdown (cleanliness, accuracy, location, value, check-in, communication) + **host responses**; `ReviewsScreen` for full list with filter.
- **Similar nearby** rail.
- **Sticky booking widget** (bottom, RTL-mirrored): price/night, date+guest summary, total, primary CTA — "احجز الآن" (instant) or "اطلب الحجز" (request-to-book).

**Booking flow** — `BookingStack` (auth required)
- `DatesGuestsScreen` — confirm/adjust dates+guests against live availability.
- `GuestDetailsScreen` — guest name/phone, **special requests** free-text, optional national-ID note for hotels.
- price-breakdown panel (carried across steps): nightly × N, cleaning fee, service fee, **total in DZD**, refundable-until line.
- `PaymentMethodScreen` — choose **Baridi Pay (BaridiMob QR)** or **Chargily Pay (Edahabia / CIB)**; "request-to-book" listings defer charge until host accept.
- `PaymentProcessingScreen` — see §3 payment sequence; spinner→success/fail driven by webhook-backed booking status, not the client.
- `BookingConfirmationScreen` — booking **reference**, lottie checkmark, **add-to-calendar** (`expo-calendar`), "message host", "view trip".

**Trips** — `TripsScreen` (segmented: Upcoming / Completed / Cancelled) → `TripDetailScreen` (itinerary, directions, check-in instructions unlocked at T-48h, cancel/modify, receipt PDF, message host, **leave review** when completed).

**Wishlists** — `WishlistsScreen` (collections grid w/ cover collage) → `WishlistDetailScreen` (saved properties, optional map, share). Heart toggles everywhere (optimistic, §3).

**Messaging** — `ConversationsScreen` (list w/ last message, unread, property thumbnail) → `ChatScreen` (Realtime, typing/sent/read receipts, quick-reply chips, booking context card pinned at top, image attach via Storage).

**Notifications** — `NotificationsScreen` (grouped: bookings, messages, price/availability, promos), per-category prefs in settings.

**Profile / Settings** — `ProfileScreen` (avatar, verification status, "Switch to Hosting", saved cards none-stored, wishlists shortcut), `EditProfileScreen`, `SettingsScreen` (language, notification channels, currency note "DZD only", legal, logout, delete account), `LanguagePickScreen`.

**Review after checkout** — `WriteReviewScreen` (overall stars + 6 category sliders + photos + comment; deep-linked from post-checkout push and `TripDetailScreen`).

### 3. State & data layer

- **`supabase-js` v2** single client (`lib/supabase.ts`) with `expo-secure-store` as the auth storage adapter; `autoRefreshToken` on, `AppState` listener toggles `startAutoRefresh/stopAutoRefresh` for Realtime token freshness.
- **Auth session** in a `useSession` hook subscribing to `onAuthStateChange`; the RootLayout gate reads it to decide public/tabs/auth. JWT carries `role`; **RLS** enforces every read/write server-side (the app never trusts client role).
- **Server state: TanStack Query v5.** Query keys mirror entities: `['property', id]`, `['results', filtersHash]`, `['trips', status]`, `['conversation', id, 'messages']`. `staleTime` tuned per surface (home rails 5 min, availability 0/refetch-on-focus). Infinite queries for results/rails. Cache persisted via `@tanstack/query-persist-client` + AsyncStorage for warm cold-starts.
- **Reads are RLS-backed PostgREST** calls through `supabase.from(...)`; heavy/curated reads (`home_rails`, viewport search with clustering pre-agg, price breakdown) go through **Edge Functions** or Postgres `rpc()` to keep filtering logic server-side and uniform across web/mobile.
- **Realtime:** one channel per open conversation (`postgres_changes` on `messages` filtered by `conversation_id`) writing into the Query cache; a per-user channel for `notifications` inserts → toast + badge + cache invalidation. Channels torn down on screen blur/unmount.
- **Optimistic favoriting:** `useToggleFavorite` mutation — `onMutate` cancels `['favorites']`, snapshots, flips the heart instantly; `onError` rolls back; `onSettled` invalidates. Wishlist membership cached locally so hearts render correct on first paint of any list.
- **Client/UI state: Zustand** (persisted): `useAppModeStore` (guest/host), `useLanguageStore`, `useRecentlyViewedStore`, `useSearchDraftStore`. Ephemeral form state stays local (`react-hook-form` + `zod`).
- **Mutations through Edge Functions** for anything money/trust-sensitive (create booking, init payment, cancel) so amounts, fees, and state transitions are authoritative server-side; client only optimistically reflects status.

**Payment sequence (request → confirm):**
1. Client `POST` to Edge Function `create-booking` → inserts `bookings` row `status='pending_payment'`, server recomputes total in **DZD**, returns `booking_id`.
2. Client `POST create-payment { booking_id, method }`:
   - **Chargily:** function calls Chargily Pay **v2** `POST /checkouts` with `amount`, `currency:'dzd'` (only supported code), `payment_method:'edahabia'|'cib'`, `success_url`/`failure_url` = `…/pay/return`, `webhook_endpoint`, `locale` = user language, `metadata:{ booking_id }`; returns `checkout_url`.
   - **Baridi Pay:** function returns the BaridiMob QR/payment payload for in-app display.
3. `PaymentProcessingScreen` opens `checkout_url` (Chargily) via `expo-web-browser` `openAuthSessionAsync`, or renders the QR.
4. Chargily/Baridi hits the Supabase webhook function; signature **HMAC-verified with the secret key**, then booking flips to `confirmed`/`failed` and a `transactions` row is written.
5. The screen reflects status from a Realtime/`refetch` on the booking (source of truth = webhook), **never** from the redirect alone → `BookingConfirmationScreen` or retry.

Verified against Chargily Pay v2 docs: checkout accepts `amount/currency/payment_method/success_url/failure_url/webhook_endpoint/metadata/locale`, returns `checkout_url`, **dzd is the only supported currency**, and webhooks carry an HMAC `signature` header to verify ([create checkout](https://dev.chargily.com/pay-v2/api-reference/checkouts/create), [webhooks](https://dev.chargily.com/pay-v2/webhooks)).

### 4. Maps choice

**Mapbox via `@rnmapbox/maps`** for the price-pin map, search-on-map, and clustering — chosen over `react-native-maps`(Google) because Mapbox offers **native GL clustering and data-driven styling** for fast price-pin rendering, vector tiles that look right with **RTL Arabic labels** (`mapbox-gl-rtl-text`), and predictable styling for the photography-forward brand. Tradeoff accepted: `@rnmapbox/maps` needs the **New Architecture and is not Expo-Go-compatible** → we already use **EAS dev/build clients** (config plugin `@rnmapbox/maps` in `app.json`). Pins are `SymbolLayer`/`MarkerView` price bubbles; clusters from a GeoJSON source with `cluster:true`; viewport bbox feeds the "search this area" query. *(If a future constraint forces Expo Go, the fallback is `react-native-maps` + `react-native-map-clustering`, which wraps Supercluster — but it requires manual price-pin work and weaker RTL labels.)* Sources: [pkgpulse RN maps comparison 2026](https://www.pkgpulse.com/blog/react-native-maps-vs-mapbox-rn-vs-maplibre-rn-mobile-maps-2026), [Expo react-native-maps docs](https://docs.expo.dev/versions/latest/sdk/map-view/).

### 5. i18n / RTL

- **`i18next` + `react-i18next`**; namespaces per area (`common`, `search`, `booking`, `property`, `review`). Keys are typed (`react-i18next` TS augmentation). Default/fallback locale resolved from device then overridden by user pick.
- **Per-user persisted language** in `expo-secure-store` (`app.language`); also written to a `profiles.preferred_locale` column so server-rendered strings (emails, push, Chargily `locale`) match.
- **RTL:** on language apply, set `I18nManager.allowRTL(true)` + `I18nManager.forceRTL(lang==='ar')`; because forcing RTL only takes effect after a native restart, do it deliberately at the moment of language selection and **`Updates.reloadAsync()`** (or prompt "restart to apply") rather than mid-session — verified guidance that `forceRTL` requires a reload and shouldn't flip live during normal use. On boot, RootLayout reads stored language and sets the flag **before** first render to avoid a flash. Sources: [React Native I18nManager](https://reactnative.dev/docs/i18nmanager), [Expo i18n/RTL guide 2026](https://reactnativerelay.com/article/react-native-i18n-expo-complete-guide-multi-language-apps).
- **Layout:** logical props only (`marginStart`/`paddingEnd`/`start`/`end`), never `left/right`. Custom tab bar, headers, back chevrons, carousels, and the booking widget mirror under RTL; directional icons (chevrons, send, arrows) flipped via a `<DirectionalIcon>` wrapper. Maps and the photo gallery stay LTR-swipe by design (geographic/EXIF order) but chrome around them mirrors.
- **Numbers/prices:** prices use **Western Arabic numerals** even in AR (`Intl.NumberFormat('en-US')` formatting then ` دج` suffix) per spec; only narrative text is localized. Dates via `date-fns` with AR/FR/EN locales.
- **Fonts:** ship an Arabic-capable family with full harakat coverage — **IBM Plex Sans Arabic** (or Cairo/Tajawal) loaded via `expo-font` alongside the Latin face, so AR/FR/EN render consistently. Avoid relying on system Arabic fonts (inconsistent across Android OEMs).

### 6. Offline / empty / loading / error states

- **Loading = skeletons, not spinners.** `react-content-loader`/Moti shimmer skeletons matching each layout: `HomeRailSkeleton`, `ResultCardSkeleton`, `PropertyDetailSkeleton`, `ChatSkeleton`. Spinners reserved only for inline button busy states and `PaymentProcessingScreen`.
- **Offline:** `@react-native-community/netinfo` → global offline banner; TanStack Query serves persisted cache so home/trips/last-viewed property render read-only offline. Mutations (favorite, send message) queue optimistically and replay on reconnect (`onlineManager` integration); payment is hard-blocked offline with a clear message.
- **Empty states:** purpose-built illustrations + CTA — no results ("وسّع نطاق البحث / clear filters"), no trips ("ابدأ الاستكشاف"), empty wishlist, empty inbox, no notifications.
- **Error states:** typed error → friendly copy + Retry; query `ErrorBoundary` per stack; Realtime drop shows a subtle "reconnecting…" chip; failed image → branded fallback. Toasts for transient mutation errors; full-screen error only for fatal route failures.

### 7. Auth requirements per screen

**Read-only public (no auth):** `SplashScreen`, `LanguagePickScreen`, `IntroCarouselScreen`, `HomeScreen` + rails, `CollectionScreen`, `SearchEntryScreen`, `ResultsScreen` (list+map), `PropertyDetailScreen`, `GalleryScreen`, `ReviewsScreen`, `PropertyLocationScreen`, `SettingsScreen→language`. These rely on RLS policies exposing only `properties.status='approved'` and related public columns to the `anon` role.

**Auth-gated (intercept → AuthStack, return after sign-in):** entire `BookingStack`, `TripsScreen`/`TripDetailScreen`, `WishlistsScreen`/toggling favorites, `InboxStack`/`ChatScreen`, `NotificationsScreen`, `WriteReviewScreen`, `ProfileScreen`/`EditProfileScreen`, and the whole `(host)` group. Tapping a heart or "احجز الآن" while signed-out triggers a bottom-sheet auth prompt that preserves intent (e.g., returns straight into booking).
